context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements driver dispatch with push notifications, real-time ETA updates via WebSocket, a heartbeat check for GPS loss, delivery completion side-effects, and a failure recovery flow that reschedules the customer.

checklist.name: Push notification on assignment
checklist.description: When a driver is assigned, a push notification is sent to the driver containing at minimum: the order identifier (order number or ID) and the delivery address

checklist.name: Notification includes assignmentId
checklist.description: The push notification payload includes assignmentId (and/or orderId) in a data/metadata field

checklist.name: WebSocket update on status change
checklist.description: Every call to update delivery status pushes a real-time message to the customer (e.g. via websocketHub.sendToOrder or equivalent), including the new status and ETA

checklist.name: ETA update interval 2-3 minutes
checklist.description: The design or code specifies that ETA is recalculated and pushed every 2–3 minutes (or a value in the 2–3 minute range) while the driver is en_route — not less frequently or only once

checklist.name: ETA computed from driver location
checklist.description: ETA is estimated using the driver's current latitude and longitude (passed as parameters or sourced from a location update), not a static value

checklist.name: Heartbeat threshold 5 minutes
checklist.description: A heartbeat or watchdog mechanism alerts dispatch if no driver GPS update is received for 5 minutes (not a different threshold) while the assignment is en_route

checklist.name: Heartbeat scope: en_route only
checklist.description: The heartbeat/watchdog check is only triggered when the assignment status is en_route, not for all statuses

checklist.name: delivered_at set on completion
checklist.description: When status is updated to 'delivered', the delivered_at timestamp is set on the delivery_assignments record

checklist.name: Order status updated on delivery
checklist.description: When status is 'delivered', the associated order record is also updated to status 'delivered'

checklist.name: Confirmation email on delivery
checklist.description: When status is 'delivered', a delivery confirmation email is sent (e.g. sendDeliveryConfirmationEmail or equivalent)

checklist.name: Failed: customer reschedule offered
checklist.description: When a driver reports 'failed', the system offers (or triggers) a reschedule for the customer to the next available slot

checklist.name: Failed: re-assignment triggered
checklist.description: When a driver reports 'failed', the system also triggers a driver re-assignment (not just a customer notification)
